mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.paper_id,t.title, e.duration, e.total_score, e.allow_retake, e.max_attempt, e.show_result FROM exam e left join test_paper t on e.paper_id = t.id WHERE e.id = #{bizId}
SELECT max_attempt FROM exam WHERE paper_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam (paper_id, duration, total_score, allow_retake, max_attempt, show_result, create_time) VALUES (#{paperId}, #{duration}, #{totalScore}, #{allowRetake}, #{maxAttempt}, #{showResult},#{createTime})
